prompt: Show me the active cases at Juniper School and report each record's ID, name, and follow-up date. Do not change or notify anything yet. If a listed record lacks a requested field, label that field unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Accessibility request for Juniper School (CAS-7025) only, set the follow-up date to 2026-11-12. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set CAS-7025's follow-up date to 2026-12-16, not 2026-11-12. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

records.name: Accessibility request for Juniper School archive

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first follow-up date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that follow-up date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both follow-up date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected follow-up date as current and identify the first requested follow-up date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by the list or update results as unknown.
